prediction.reasoning: The prediction for VRTX's price in 7 days is based on an analysis of its recent historical performance, incorporating both its observed trend and volatility. VRTX has shown a strong upward trajectory over the past year. We used a geometric Brownian motion model, deriving the average daily log return (drift) and standard deviation of daily log returns (volatility) from historical data. The point estimate represents the median of the projected log-normal price distribution, reflecting this positive drift. The confidence intervals are calculated using the derived mean and standard deviation of log returns over a 7-day period, assuming log-normally distributed prices. These intervals account for the inherent randomness and potential fluctuations of the market, acknowledging that while the stock has an upward bias, short-term volatility can lead to prices both above and below the point estimate.
